feed.title: nobertos
feed.subtitle: Yet another yet another programming blog by Rayene Nassim ZORGANI aka nobertos.

entry.title: My blog
entry.summary: Hello and welcome to my blog, I am planning on sharing my journey of learning about distributed systems and low level programming :).
entry.content:
My blog Jan 21, 2025

Hello and welcome to my blog, I am planning on sharing my journey of learning about distributed systems and low level programming :).
